scripts.generate-openapi:
sh -lc "pnpm exec typed-openapi --schemas-only --runtime zod ../../api/openapi.json --output src/lib/generated/schema.ts && pnpm exec openapi-typescript-codegen --input ../../api/openapi.json --output src/lib/generated --useUnionTypes --name Client --useOptions && sed -i 's/z.record(/z.record(z.string(), /' src/lib/generated/schema.ts && sed -i 's/type: string/type: "personal"/' src/lib/generated/models/PersonalAccount.ts && sed -i 's/type: string/type: "clearing"/' src/lib/generated/models/ClearingAccount.ts && grep -rlZ eslint-disable src/lib/generated | xargs -0 sed -i 's/eslint-disable/oxlint-disable/' && echo "/* oxlint-disable */
$(cat src/lib/generated/schema.ts)" > src/lib/generated/schema.ts && echo "/* tslint:disable */
$(cat src/lib/generated/schema.ts)" > src/lib/generated/schema.ts && echo "/* istanbul ignore file */
$(cat src/lib/generated/schema.ts)" > src/lib/generated/schema.ts && pnpm exec oxfmt src/lib/generated"
